Cell.Data: The DEV TEAM / MISC NOTES column contains info on what text between { } signs means (if applicable). It usually stands for either a numeric value, or a numeric value with an icon. Text between [ ] signs stands for a certain type of icon.
A maelstrom often means a state of violent turmoil or sporadic movement.
The Soul Beacon siphons and redistributes Essence from hostile troops to friendly troops within the area.
Światło dusz transportuje esencję, pobierając ją od wrogich wojsk i przekazując przyjaznym wojskom w okolicy.
“Heritor” is a the new secret tech introduced in Planetfall’s first expansion. “Essence” refers to an type of life force/energy that is repeatedly mentioned within the Heritor secret technology.

[br/][br/]While within this colony domain, every {turns}[turn/] combat turns: [bulletList][bullet]Each [abilityred]enemy[/abilityred] unit has a {strength}[strengthentropy/] strength chance to suffer [abilityred]Energy Drained[/abilityred] for {drainedturns}[turn/].[/bullet][bullet]In addition, each [abilityblue]friendly[/abilityblue] unit gains an [abilityblue]Essence Charge[/abilityblue].[/bullet]

[br/][br/]Na terytorium tej kolonii co {turns}[turn/] tury/tur walki:[bulletList][bullet]Każda jednostka [abilityred]wroga[/abilityred] ma szansę o sile {strength}[strengthentropy/] na doznanie [abilityred]wyczerpania energii[/abilityred] na {drainedturns}[turn/].[/bullet][bullet]Dodatkowo każda [abilityblue]przyjazna[/abilityblue] jednostka zyskuje jeden [abilityblue]ładunek esencji[/abilityblue].[/bullet]
Out of combat means within the world map. And strategic turn also means a turn within the world map. Combat turn refers to a turn within tactical combat.
The Cluster Mine Launcher harrasses all enemy troops when engaged by firing mines near them.
Wyrzutnia min kasetowych nęka wszystkie wojska wroga, wystrzeliwując miny w ich pobliże.

While within the colony domain, every {turns}[turn/] combat turn: [bulletList][bullet]{mineamount} mines will be placed at random locations on the map.[/bullet][bullet][abilityred]Enemy[/abilityred] non-Flying, non-Floating units passing over or starting their turn on a mine have a {strength}[strengthphysical/] strength chance to suffer {minedamage}[damagekinetic/] damage.[/bullet][bullet][abilityblue]Friendly[/abilityblue] units are not affected by the mines.[/bullet]

Na terytorium tej kolonii co {turns}[turn/] tury/tur walki: [bulletList][bullet]W losowo wybranych miejscach na mapie zostaną podłożone miny ({mineamount}).[/bullet][bullet][abilityred]Wrogie[/abilityred] jednostki poruszające się po ziemi, przechodzące przez minę lub rozpoczynające na niej turę, mają szansę o sile {strength}[strengthphysical/] na odniesienie {minedamage}[damagekinetic/] pkt. obrażeń.[/bullet][bullet]Miny nie działają na jednostki [abilityblue]przyjazne[/abilityblue].[/bullet]
Out of combat means within the world map. And strategic turn also means a turn within the world map. Combat turn refers to a turn within tactical combat.
A killzone is an area of a military engagement with a high concentration of fatalities, often caused by the deployment of heavy weapons within that area.
The Firestorm Missile Silo designates a killzone and will automatically lock on to enemy units within the area when engaged.
Silos rakietowy burzy ogniowej wyznacza strefę śmierci i będzie automatycznie namierzać jednostki wroga znajdujące się na tym obszarze.

While within the colony domain, every {turns}[turn/] turns: [bulletList][bullet]A random enemy unit gains [abilityred]Firestorm Missile Lock.[/abilityred][/bullet][bulletList] [bullet] After another turn, that unit will be struck by a Firestorm Missile.[/bullet][bullet]Firestorm Missile deals {damagecenter}[damagethermal/] damage with [abilityred]Massive Impact[abilityred/] on the center target hex.[/bullet] [bullet]It also deals {damage2}[damagethermal/] with [abilityred]High Impact[/abilityred] within a 2 hex radius.[/bullet][bullet]In addition, the missile will leave fire hazards on all affected hexes.[/bullet]

Na terytorium tej kolonii co {turns}[turn/] tury/tur: [bulletList][bullet]Losowo wybrana jednostka wroga zyskuje [abilityred]namierzenie przez burzę ogniową.[/abilityred][/bullet][bulletList] [bullet]Po kolejnej turze ta jednostka zostanie trafiona rakietą „Burza ogniowa”.[/bullet][bullet]Burza ogniowa zadaje {damagecenter}[damagethermal/] pkt. obrażeń z efektem [abilityred]potężnego uderzenia[abilityred/] pośrodku obszaru rażenia.[/bullet] [bullet]Zadaje też {damage2}[damagethermal/] z efektem [abilityred]silnego uderzenia[/abilityred] w promieniu 2 pól.[/bullet][bullet]Dodatkowo na wszystkich rażonych polach pozostawia zagrożenie ogniowe.[/bullet]
Out of combat means within the world map. And strategic turn also means a turn within the world map. Combat turn refers to a turn within tactical combat.
Enemy units passing through or ending their turn on this hex have a {strength}[strengthphysical/] to suffer {damage}[damagephysical/]
Wrogie jednostki przemieszczające się przez to pole lub kończące na nim turę mają szansę (siła {strength}[strengthphysical/]) na doznanie {damage}[damagephysical/].

In the text below, text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.

In the text below, any inserted strings - anything of the form {text} - is replaced by an integer value for the thing described in the brackets. If the {text} is not followed by a unit - e.g. shields, hitpoints - the icon for the unit is inserted together with the integer. The same holds for symbols - e.g. '+', '%' - which are occasionally inserted together with the integer.
For references to game terminology and in-world references, please check the glossary delivered as part of the documentation.
